hero.subtitle:
Technology designed to disappear into your recovery.
Warm materials, silent support, natural progress.

values.title: You are not alone
values.subtitle: NeuroGuard combines clinical psychology with technology to give you the tools you need, when you need them.

therapy.title: 24/7 Support
therapy.desc: Access your personalized therapeutic assistant. CBT techniques to manage anxiety in real time.

progress.title: Motivating Progress
progress.desc: Visualize your evolution. Celebrate every clean day and turn recovery into a positive experience.

privacy.title: Total Security
privacy.desc: Your safe space, always available. Offline crisis plans, guaranteed privacy, and emergency tools.

dashboard_preview.desc: Everything in one glance. Track your mood, manage your vitality battery, and access quick tools for crisis management.

tools.title: Therapeutic Support
tools.subtitle: Access specialized clinical tools designed for your recovery journey.

gym.title: Mental Gym
gym.subtitle: Train your mind with scientifically designed exercises to improve focus and memory.

arcade.title: Neuro-Arcade
arcade.desc: Immersive experiences that make therapy engaging. Fight distractions in Neuro-Strike or find your flow in Neuro-Flight.

features.title: Your Gym for the Mind
features.subtitle: Train your brain to resist impulses
features.game_desc: Gamified therapy. Slash through addiction triggers in a rhythm-based environment.

cta_section.title: Ready to reclaim your life?
cta_section.subtitle: Join the community that understands your journey.

arcade.desc: Games, challenges, and the battle against the Shadow. Earn XP!
